message.content:
In the project at /Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe, find:
1. The buyback detail page component (look in src/pages-layer/ and app/)
2. Where BuybackPaymentModal is used/triggered (search for "BuybackPaymentModal" and "buyback-payment-modal")
3. The useBuybackAsset hook and buyback services file (src/shared/api/query-hooks/use-buyback.ts and src/shared/api/services/buyback.ts or similar)
4. The useCreateCheckoutSession and useCreatePayment hooks (src/shared/api/query-hooks/use-payments.ts)
5. Any existing buyback payment page (not modal) in app/ routes

Return file paths and key code snippets.
